dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The time has come.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Let us check our personal effects.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: All clear, sir.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And now, our appearances.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: All clear, sir.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And a final check of our verbal etiquette.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: All set, please. Will do my best, please.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I feel nothing but anxiety about this,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but we've done everything we could.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Now, onward...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: To Eden College's interview!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It's so big!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well, it is one of this country's top schools.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: And there are so many examinees...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: They're all our rivals.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anya, are you going to be okay in this crowd?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'll be okay, please.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Let us go, then.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This feeling...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There's no doubt about it.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I've experienced this many times.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Someone is watching us. Could it be...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Is there an enemy hidden in this crowd?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: An enemy?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I feel someone's gaze...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No, that's not it.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm not the only one being watched.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's always an unpleasant feeling to be observed like this.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Four in the overhead passage.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Four in the bell tower.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: More in the buildings to the left and right.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I have information on most of the staff at this school.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Those... are the instructors.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: They're observing every action that everyone is taking and scoring them

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: to see if they're worthy of this school.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Which means... the exam has already begun.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need you two to be on your guard.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We're being watched by the examiners.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We'll do this just as we practiced.

dialogue.name: Instructor A
dialogue.speech: D-, fail.

dialogue.name: Instructor B
dialogue.speech: A-, fail.

dialogue.name: Instructor D
dialogue.speech: G-, pass.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: I must say, the examinees this year lack refinement.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: They all lack true elegance.

dialogue.name: Teachers
dialogue.speech: Good morning, Housemaster.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: It displeases me to know their crude feet

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: are trudging upon the blessed ground of our school.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Elegance creates tradition.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Elegance is what truly makes this world a paradise.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Fail any family lacking elegance immediately.

dialogue.name: Instructor B
dialogue.speech: Yes, sir.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Hm?

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Oho...

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: It appears that not all hope has been lost.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: They are paying their respects to the statue of our founder?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I, Twilight, am a man of a thousand faces.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Becoming exactly the person my target wants me to be is mere child's play.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Behold!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I haven't the slightest clue as to who this gentleman is,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: but everything should be fine as long as I do what Loid is doing.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Baldy head!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: S-So elegant!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: How very elegant!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Who is that family?

dialogue.name: Instructor D
dialogue.speech: K-. They are the Forgers, sir.

dialogue.name: Instructor D
dialogue.speech: Their daughter Anya just barely passed the written exam with a score of .

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Absolutely not elegant! And such awful penmanship!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: So the father has remarried?

dialogue.name: Instructor B
dialogue.speech: Might they be an impromptu family for admission purposes?

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: I am not certain. We must investigate.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: We must ascertain whether or not they have true elegance.

dialogue.name: Instructor E
dialogue.speech: We'll confirm your admission numbers here.

dialogue.name: Instructor F
dialogue.speech: G-. Please go to Hall .

dialogue.name: Instructor F
dialogue.speech: Ah, A-. Please enter Hall .

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I see they're wasting no time with the screening.

dialogue.name: Instructor F
dialogue.speech: K-. Please head to Hall .

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We're still being observed. Don't let your guard down.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It's so nerve-racking being watched like this...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I need to pick my nose.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Absolutely not.

dialogue.name: Boy
dialogue.speech: Oh, no!

dialogue.name: Boy
dialogue.speech: I've accidentally fallen into the gutter, and I can't get out!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Uh... That's too blatant if they're trying to test us.

dialogue.name: Boy
dialogue.speech: Oh, no. Whatever shall I do?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Perhaps they're thinking he might be a threat,

dialogue.name: Boy
dialogue.speech: Ah, I don't know what I should do.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but no one is trying to go near him.

dialogue.name: Boy
dialogue.speech: Who knew there'd be a gutter here?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But if he is part of the test, we must deal with this accordingly.

dialogue.name: Boy
dialogue.speech: I'm so shocked. I'm really stuck.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa! Mama! There is someone who needs our help, please!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Let us save him!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Are you all right, lad?

dialogue.name: Boy
dialogue.speech: Oh, no! I've slipped and I cannot get up!

dialogue.name: Boy Internal
dialogue.speech: This is all for merits... More merits!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Precisely.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: You're heading to an interview. You wouldn't dare sully your clothes with sewage.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Now, how will you elegantly get through—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Are you hurt?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Use my hanky, please.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Make sure you go to the infirmary, just in case.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Clearly, I expected too much.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: In the end, they were just some commoners from the countryside.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Do not think for a second that you can

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: set foot in our house of learning wearing soiled clothes.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Throw K- out immediately.

dialogue.name: Boy
dialogue.speech: Oh, no... These people are going to fail because of me.

dialogue.name: Boy
dialogue.speech: Um, I'm so sorr—

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Thank goodness we anticipated this,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: and prepared a change of clothes just in case!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Who in the world would ever anticipate that?!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Besides, your grey suit seems to fit the attire at this school more.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If I had continued wearing my previous suit,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: we would've been mistaken for commoners from the countryside.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Thank you for giving us the opportunity to change, lad.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: On top of everything else, they even thanked the boy!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Brilliant... So smart, and elegant!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Curse you and your cunning, Loid Forger.

dialogue.name: Instructor B
dialogue.speech: Housemaster, we are supposed to be testing the child.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Silence!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Children learn from their parents' example!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Yes. The parents of a child who scores points must also be only worth points!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: I'll make you reveal your true identity yet!

dialogue.name: Man
dialogue.speech: Oh, no!

dialogue.name: Man
dialogue.speech: The animals have escaped the farmhouse!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You're really going this far, Eden College?!

dialogue.name: Mob
dialogue.speech: Hey, don't push me!

dialogue.name: Mob
dialogue.speech: Just go, you moron!

dialogue.name: Mob
dialogue.speech: Mommy! Mommy, Mommy!

dialogue.name: Mob
dialogue.speech: Shut up!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Are they trying to see if we reveal our true selves in an emergency?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We'll be playing right into the examiners' hands if we panic.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Do not break Formation D.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We will show these animals nothing but benevolence!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Hey.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Who told you to go that far?

dialogue.name: Instructor D
dialogue.speech: Wait...

dialogue.name: Instructor D
dialogue.speech: It wasn't you, Housemaster?

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Impossible! Is this...

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: an actual accident?!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: There are some very important people among the examinees!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Go stop this mess before they're hurt!

dialogue.name: Vice Minister
dialogue.speech: I'm the Vice Minister of the Ministry of Finance!

dialogue.name: Banker
dialogue.speech: Hell if I care! I'm the CEO of the Central Bank!

dialogue.name: Child A
dialogue.speech: Wait! Father!

dialogue.name: Vice Minister
dialogue.speech: Well done, you!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Are you all right?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It's happening to Miss Anya again.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The mass panic must've hit her.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The test is the last thing I need to worry about now.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That must be the leader of this herd.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's the one I need to s but I'll have to use my g*n—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Please look after Miss Anya for a moment.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yor?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I-It's not what you think!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I once learned about pressure points that can stop one's movements in a yoga class!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I-I figured they might work on cows, too!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Please don't look at me like that!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Ms. Cow?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Is she scared?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's dangerous, Anya!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: S'okay, please. Don't be scared.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What are you—

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: They're gonna go home now.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Apparently so.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Thankfully, no one was hurt.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: E-Ele...

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Ele-le... Ele-le-le-le...

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Elegance!

dialogue.name: Instructor B
dialogue.speech: Housemaster?

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Forger!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: He's...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: one of the housemasters.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Is he in charge of this exam?

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Y-You helped us avoid a crisis. I thank you.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: And... you have bested me for today.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: To give us all time to collect ourselves after this chaos,

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: we will be delaying the start of the interviews.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Return to your hall once you've had a moment to tidy yourselves.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Your family has the right to apply to our school.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Sir...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It looks like we've avoided failure.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I humbly thank you for your generosity.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But have no fear.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We anticipated something like this...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and prepared another change of clothes.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: This isn't about elegance anymore! These people are just scary!

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: The Forgers successfully make it to the actual interview.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: You truly thought you could apply to our school without even knowing that?

dialogue.name: Child B
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: Well? Cat got your tongue?

dialogue.name: Child B
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Child B
dialogue.speech: Um, uh...

dialogue.name: Father D
dialogue.speech: Thank you very much.

dialogue.name: Father D
dialogue.speech: What kind of answer was that?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I've been a spy for over a decade,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and for the first time...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm actually nervous.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Even when I infiltrated the ranks of an evil t*rror1st group,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: or when I managed to stop the launch of a m*ssile with one second remaining...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I never found it so hard to breathe as I do right now.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The fear of letting someone else decide my success or failure...

dialogue.name: Instructor G
dialogue.speech: Next, the Forgers.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Yep!

dialogue.name: Loid and Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes, sir.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yes, this is definitely going to be...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: the most crucial moment of Operation Strix!

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: Please, have a seat.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Thank you for having us.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: So you've come, Forgers.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The Forgers shall prevail in this game of information warfare.

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: First, we will begin by asking the parents a few questions.

dialogue.name: Walter Evans Housemaster of Dorm Subject Taught
dialogue.speech: English Personality: Mild-mannered • Sincere • Conservative

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The housemaster of Dorm , Malcom Hall.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Mild-mannered, sincere, and conservative.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The students are very fond of him.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: As long as we respond with sincere, logical answers,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: we'll score highly with him.

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: I was informed that this is your second wife. May I ask how you two met?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I see we're getting straight to the point.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Eden College does prioritize family values, after all.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I met my wife at the tailor shop that handles this school's uniforms,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and I was in awe of her grace.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Ever since I lost my first wife,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I was hesitant to pursue another relationship because of my daughter.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But the more we spoke, the more I felt that she was a kindred spirit.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She is truly kind and cares dearly about family.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I came to the conclusion that she'd get along well with my daughter.

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: Ah... And what about you, Madam?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Well...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: L-Loid is a wonderful person who truly cares for his daughter.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: He's also very considerate of me.

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: Ah, I'm happy to hear that you have such a loving family.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: Why would a beautiful girl like you choose to be with a man who's got baggage?

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: That was rather uncouth, Master Swan.

dialogue.name: Murdoch Swan Housemaster of Dorm "Cline Hall" Subject Taught
dialogue.speech: Economics Personality: Arrogant • Greedy • Callous

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The housemaster of Dorm , Cline Hall.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: He's the only son of the former headmaster, and a legacy hire.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Arrogant, greedy, and callous.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: His wife filed for divorce last month,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and he just lost custody of his daughter, as well.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Reviewing all of his previous interview questions and comments,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: he is clearly jealous of other families, and takes out his frustrations on them.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's best that we avoid provoking him.

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: Now for our next question.

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: Could you tell us why you chose to apply to our school?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: For only one reason, sir.

dialogue.name: Loid Internal
dialogue.speech: To get close to my target, Desmond!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The quality of the instructors at this establishment is superior.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Of course, you are all very knowledgeable and cultured,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but when it comes to teaching anything, from patriotism to how to be an elite,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: the instructors of the prestigious Eden College

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: are second to none.

dialogue.name: Henry Henderson Housemaster of Dorm "Cecil Hall" Subject Taught
dialogue.speech: History Personality: Elegant

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Elegantly done, Loid Forger.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: I knew I saw potential in you.

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: Now then, how would the two of you describe your daughter?

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: Please let us know about her strengths and weaknesses.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anya is an extremely curious child.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Her habit of sticking her nose where it doesn't belong could be seen as a weakness,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but she is a truly intelligent child.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Intelligent?! Her?!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Shock!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Sometimes, it's like she sees right through me,

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Yikes...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: which keeps me on my feet.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I would say her main shortcoming is that she's a picky eater.

dialogue.name: Evan
dialogue.speech: Ah... And how would you describe your parenting style, Madam?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Just like we practiced...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: As you already know, I am not her biological mother.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: At first, I spoiled her quite often in hopes that she would like me.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: But for the sake of her future, I'm hoping I can become a bit stricter at times.

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: We've been told that your daughter is a picky eater.

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: What kind of meals do you cook at home?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh? C-Cook?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Um...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I actually do most of the cooking.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Though when I'm busy, my wife is kind enough to cook for me.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Not that that's happened even once yet.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: You're joking! What kind of wife can't cook for her husband?!

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: You should probably be stricter with yourself before you worry about that child.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Everyone has strengths and weaknesses.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She is extremely tidy and excels at keeping our house spotless.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She is also an excellent mother to my daughter.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: Yes, well, both of those are things women are expected to do.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That's—

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I-It's all right, Loid.

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: Now, now...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yes. Calm down.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Why are you getting irritated, Twilight?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She's not even your real wife.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: A lovey-dovey hot couple? You make me sick.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: I'll keep jabbing at you until you slip up.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: If I can't make sure these two fail, there's clearly no justice in this world.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: He doesn't like Papa and Mama!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I need to do my best!

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: N-Next, let's ask the young lady some questions.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Here it comes.

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: First, could you tell us your name and address?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: My name is Anya Holger!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: My address is in... Berlint, West District...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Park... Avenue!

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: And what do you do on your days off, young lady?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: We go to moozeums...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: and eat operas...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Good. These were questions we anticipated.

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: What would you like to do once you get into this school?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Um, uh...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: What was I supposed to say?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: In my case, I first need to participate in a social gathering,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and get to the bottom of what the boss of the enemy organization, Desmond, is planning.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I-I want to find out what the boss of the organization is planning!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What in the world are you saying?! Hello?!

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: The boss of the organization? Maybe you meant the headmaster.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I do apologize. My daughter is rather ambitious.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She's extremely curious about the headmaster, since he's clearly made it to the top.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Oho...

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: The desire to learn from her predecessors at such an early age...

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: That's quite elegant.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Do you happen to know the name of the principal, young lady?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Um, B-Be...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yes. Benedict Ivan Goodfellow.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mr. Benedick Advent Goodheller.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Hmm... Then,

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: could you tell us how hard you would have to work in order to succeed like him?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Yes. Like getting through the jungle with no supplies,

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: and dancing with death over and over to get brave!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: That was the training montage the protagonist of her spy cartoon did yesterday.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: S-Such incredible resolve!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: It appears as though I have underestimated this young lady.

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: I don't think you have to do quite that much.

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: Let's change the subject. What does your father do for a living?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: He's a sp—a speshulist in mental health. A very good one.

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: Hm? Are you a little stuffed up?

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: Then how do you feel about your new mother?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: She is very nice.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: But she's scary sometimes.

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: If you were to give your parents a score, what might that be?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: A perfect points.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: My Papa and Mama are both so much fun, and I love them very much.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I want to be with them forever.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: Tch. God, no one needs this rubbish.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: In that case, would you score your old mother or your new mother higher?

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: Come now, Master Swan...

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: Is there a problem?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: May I respectfully request a different question?

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: Absolutely not. If you do not answer, you will lose points.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I don't know exactly how she ended up in that orphanage,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but her actual parents are probably already...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Ma...ma...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anya...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mama...

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: I see, I see.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: So you do prefer your old mother.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: This is too cruel!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Please calm down, Yor.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: But this is just—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We need to remain calm for the sake of this mission.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: We have plenty of students here who live away from their parents in our dorms.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: If she's going to cry over every little trifling thing,

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: she'll never survive at our establishment!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: So what if he's being slanderous?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We are nothing more than a pretend family.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Trifling? You call this trifling?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: This is nothing.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: Now, now, Mrs. Second Wife.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: Don't snap at me just because she loves her real mother more.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: Oh, I feel so much better.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Restrain yourself...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Twilight!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I do beg your pardon.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There was a mosquito.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Thank you very much for your time today.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: Hey, where are you going?!

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: The interview's not over yet!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If making light of a child's feelings is part of your establishment's educational policies,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: then I'm afraid we have chosen the wrong school.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: You fiend! You dare disgrace our fine school?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Come now, you two.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Please excuse us.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: Don't think you'll ever walk through our gates again!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: That's quite enough, Master Swan.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: Are you taking issue with my methods?

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: He may be the former headmaster,

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: Now, now...

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: but my father's influence within this school is still strong.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: It'd be wise for you to watch that mouth of yours.

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: Hey! Hurry up and call the next one in!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: ...the instructors of the prestigious Eden College

dialogue.name: flashback Loid
dialogue.speech: are second to none.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: If all I can do is curry favor with the authorities,

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: I have no right to call myself an educator.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: I must ask, who truly disgraced our school?

dialogue.name: Swan
dialogue.speech: Huh?!

dialogue.name: Evans
dialogue.speech: Wha—

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Hmm...

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: That was rather elegant, if I do say so myself.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Now, will you be able to face the instructors at Eden head-on,

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Forgers?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yeah... We definitely failed.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I-I'll go make us some tea.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I've failed yet again as a spy.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I let unnecessary feelings get in the way of the mission.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm sorry.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm so sorry that I couldn't do better

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: on my tests.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's all right, Anya. You have no reason to apologize.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You don't want to go to a school like that, do you?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: But I want to go to school...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Anya Internal
dialogue.speech: If this mission fails...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I have to go to school or...

dialogue.name: Anya Internal
dialogue.speech: ...we won't be together anymore.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anya...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: If she fails, of course, our life here together will be...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: But that doesn't matter.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm just worried how this may affect my work.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hmm... But to be honest,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hell will freeze over before you pass.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Shock!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I-I'm sure everything will be okay!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It'll all work out!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: The grandpa with the glasses and the grandpa with the half-glasses

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: were really nice!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes, exactly!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm sure they'll vouch for us! Let's believe in them.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Spies don't believe in anyone other than themselves.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: They always expect the worst-case scenarios and prepare for them.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I want to be with them forever.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But... Maybe just a little bit...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yes. Let's leave the result to fate,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and try to recover from how exhausting that exam was.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Right now, just for a little bit...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: To our family's bright future!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Something just fell!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Our family portrait fell to the floor.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It just fell...

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: What will become

dialogue.name: Narrator
dialogue.speech: of their mission?
